text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying - the narrator Ismail transmitted it from Abu Hurairah, and mentioned the tradition about the coming down of revelation-: So far (is this the case) that when terror is removed from their hearts.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The reading of the following verse by the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… goes: Nay, but there came to thee (ja'atki) my signs, and thou didst reject them (fakadhdhabti biha) ; thou wast haughty (wastakbarti) and became one of those who reject Faith (wa kunti). Abu Dawud said: This is a mursal tradition, i.e. the link of the Companion has been omitted, for the narrator al-Rabi did not meet Umm Salamah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ .
narrator: Narrated Umm Salamah, wife of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… read: (There is for him) Rest and satisfaction (faruhun wa rayhan).
narrator: Narrated Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ , Ummul Muminin:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: I heard the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… read on the pulpit the verse: They will cry: O Malik. Abu Dawud said: That is, without shortening the name (Malik).
narrator: Abdah bin Yala quoting his father said:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… made me read the verse It is I who give (all) sustenance, Lord of power, steadfast (for ever).
narrator: Narrated Abdullah bin Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text:
The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… used to read the verse Is there any that will receive admonition (muddakir)? that is with doubling of consonant. 
Abu Dawud said: With Dammah on the mim, fathah on (dal), and kasrah on the Qaf.
narrator: Narrated Abdullah bin Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: I saw the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… reading the verse; does he think that his wealth would make him last for ever?
narrator: Narrated Jabir bin Abdullah:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… made a man read the verse: For, that day His chastisement will be such as none (else) can be chastised. And his bonds will be such as none (other) can be bound. Abu Dawud said: According to some (scholars), there is a narrator between the narrator Khalid and Abu Qilabah.
narrator: Narrated Abu Qilabah:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… related a tradition in which he mentioned the words Jibril and Mikal and he pronounced them Jibra'ila wa Mika'ila. Abu Dawud said: Khalaf said: I did not put the pen aside from writing letters (huruf) for forty years: nothing tired me (or made me incapable of writing), even Jibril and Mika'il did not tire me.
narrator: Narrated Abu Saeed al-Khudri ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… mentioned the name of the one who will sound the trumpet (sahib as-sur) and said: On his right will be Jibra'il and on his left will be Mika'il.
narrator: Narrated Abu Saeed al-Khudri ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, Abu Bakr, Umar and Uthman used to read maliki yawmid-din (master of the Day of Judgment) . The first to read maliki yawmid-din was Marwan. Abu Dawud said: This is sounder that the tradition which transmitted by al-Zuhri from Anas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ , and al-Zuhri from Salim, from his father (Ibn Umar).
narrator: Narrated Ibn al-Musayyab:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… used to recite: In the name of Allah, the Cherisher and Sustainer of the worlds; most Gracious, most Merciful; Master of the Day of Judgment, breaking its recitation into verses, one after another. Abu Dawud said: I heard Ahmad (bin Hanbal) say: The early reading is: Maliki yawmi'l-din.
narrator: Narrated Umm Salamah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ , Ummul Muminin:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: I was sitting behind the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… who was riding a donkey while the sun was setting. He asked: Do you know where this sets ? I replied: Allah and his Messenger know best. He said: It sets in a spring of warm water (Hamiyah).
narrator: Narrated Abu Dharr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… came to them in the swelling place of immigrants and a man asked him: Which is the greatest verse of the Quran ? The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… replied: Allah, there is no god but He - the Living, the Self-Subsisting Eternal. No slumber can seize Him nor sleep.
narrator: Narrated Ibn al-Asqa ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: He read the verse: Now come, thou (haita laka). Then Shariq said: We read it, hi'tu laka (I am prepared for thee). Ibn Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said: I read it as I have been taught; it is dearer to me.
narrator: Narrated Ibn Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: Abdullah (bin Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ) was told that the people had read this verse: She said: Now come, thou (hita laka). He said: I read it as I have been taught ; it is dearer to me. It goes wa qalat haita laka (She said: Now come thou).
narrator: Narrated Shariq:
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Allah, the Exalted, said to the children of Israel: . . . but enter the gate with humility, in posture and in words, and you will be forgiven your faults (tughfar lakum) .
narrator: Narrated Abu Saeed Al Khudri ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Hisham bin Saad with a different chain of narrators in a similar way.
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The revelation came down to Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… and he recited to is: A surah which We have sent down and which We have ordained (faradnaha) Abu Dawud said: Meaning, (without doubling the Ra) such that these verses follow.
narrator: Narrated Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ :
chapterName: Dialects and Readings of the Qur'an (Kitab Al-Huruf Wa Al-Qira'at)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The Jews were split up into seventy-one or seventy-two sects; and the Christians were split up into seventy one or seventy-two sects; and my community will be split up into seventy-three sects.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Muawiyah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ stood among us and said: Beware! The Messenger of ALLA H ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… stood among us and said: Beware! The people of the Book before were split up into seventy-two sects, and this community will be split into seventy three: seventy-two of them will go to Hell and one of them will go to Paradise, and it is the majority group. Ibn Yahya and Amr added in their version: вҖң There will appear among my community people who will be dominated by desires like rabies which penetrates its patientвҖқ, AmrвҖҷs version has: вҖңpenetrates its patient. There remains no vein and no joint but it penetrates it. вҖқ
narrator: Abu Amir al-Hawdhani said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… recited this verse: вҖңHe it is who has sent down to thee the Book: in it are verses basic or fundamental. . . . вҖқ Up to вҖңmen of understandingвҖқ. She said: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… then said: When you see those people who follow that which is allegorical in the Quran, those are the people whom Allah has named (in the Quran). So avoid them.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The best of the actions is to love for the sake of Allah and to hate for the sake of Allah.
narrator: Narrated Abu Dharr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Abdullah bin Kab bin Malik who used to lead his father from among his sons when he became blind, said: I heard Kaab bin Malik say: The transmitter Ibn al-sarh then narrated the story of his remaining behind from the prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… forbade the Muslims to speak to any of us three. When ( in this state) abundant time passed on me, I ascended the wall of the garden of Abu Qatadah who was my cousin. I saluted him, but, I swear by Allah, he did not return salute to me. He then narrated the story of the revelation of the Quranic verses relating to his repentance.
narrator: Narrator Abdullah bin Kab:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I came to my family when my hands had cracks. They dyed me with saffron. I then went to Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… and saluted him, but he did not return me salutation. He said: Go and wash it away from you.
narrator: Ammar bin Yasir ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The camel of Safiyyah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ daughter of Huyayy was fatigued, and Zainab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ had a surplus mount. The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said to Zainab: Give her the camel. She said: Should I give to that Jewess? Thereupon the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… became angry and kept away from her during Dhu al-Hijjah, Muharram, and a part of Safar.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Controverting about the Quran is disbelief.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Beware! I have been given the Quran and something like it, yet the time is coming when a man replete on his couch will say: Keep to the Quran; what you find in it to be permissible treat as permissible, and what you find in it to be prohibited treat as prohibited. Beware! The domestic ass, beasts of prey with fangs, a find belonging to confederate, unless its owner does not want it, are not permissible to you If anyone comes to some people, they must entertain him, but if they do not, he has a right to mulct them to an amount equivalent to his entertainment.
narrator: Narrated Al-Miqdam bin yakarib ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Let me not find one of you reclining on his couch when he hears something regarding me which I have commanded or forbidden and saying: We do not know. What we found in Allah's Book we have followed.
narrator: Narrated Abu Rafi ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: if any one introduces into this affair of ours anything which does not belong to it, it is rejected. Ibn Isa said: the prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: if anyone practices any action in away other than our practice, it is rejected.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Beware! The extremists perished, saying it three times.
narrator: Abdullah bin Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: If anyone summons other to follow right guidance, his reward will be equivalent to that of the people who follow him, without their rewards being diminished in any respect on that account; and if anyone summons others to follow error the sin of which sins being diminished in any respect on that account.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: The Muslim who offends most against the Muslims is he who enquires about something which has not been forbidden to men, and it is declared forbidden because of his enquiry.
narrator: Amir bin Sa'd ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ on his fatherвҖҷs authority reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Ibn Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ had a friend from the people of Syria who used to correspond with him. Abdullah bin Umar wrote to him: I have been informed that you have talked something about Divine decree. You should write it to me, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: Among my community there will be people who will falsify Divine decree.
narrator: Nafi said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I said to al-Hasan: Abu Saeed, tell me about Adam. Was he created for the heaven or the earth? He said: No, for the earth. I said: It was unavoidable for him. I said: Tell me about the following verse of the Quran: вҖқcan lead (any) into temptation concerning Allah, except such as are (themselves) going to blazing fire. вҖқ He said: The devils do not lead anyone astray by their temptation except the one whom Allah destined to go to Hell.
narrator: Khalid al-Hadhdha said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan about the Quranic verse: вҖңAnd for this did He create them. вҖқ He said: He created these for this and those for that.
narrator: Khalid al-Hadhdha, asked:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan about the Quranic verse: вҖңCan lead (any) into temptation concerning Allah, except such as are (themselves) going to the blazing fire. вҖқ He said: Except the one whom Allah destined that he should go to Hell.
narrator: Khalid al-Hadhdha asked:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan used to say that his fall from the heaven on the earth is dearer to him than uttering: The matter is in my hand.
narrator: Humaid said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan came to us. The jurists of Makkah told me that I should speak to him that some day he should hold a meeting for them and preach to them. He said: Yes. So they gathered and he addressed them. I did not see anyone on orator greater than him. A man said: Abu Saeed, who created Satan? He replied: Glory be to Allah! Is there any creator other than Allah? Allah created Satan, and he created good and created evil. The man said: May Allah ruin them! How do they lie to this old man.
narrator: Humaid said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan about the verse: вҖңEven so do We let it creep into the hearts of the sinners. вҖқ He said: Polytheism
narrator: Humaid al-Tawil asked:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Explaining the Quranic verse; вҖңAnd between them and their desire is placed a barrier. вҖқ Al-Hasan said: Between them and their faith.
narrator: Narrator Ubaid As-Sayd:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I was a prisoner in Syria. A man called me from behind. I turned towards him and suddenly found that it was Raja bin Haiwah. He said: Abu Awn, what is this that the people are telling about al-Hasan? I said: They are much lying to al-Hasan.
narrator: Ibn Awn said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Two kinds of people have lied to al-Hasan: people who believed in free will and they intended that they publicise their belief by it; and people who had enmity with and hostility (for al-Hasan), saying: Did he not say so and so? Did he not say so and so?
narrator: Ayyub said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Qurrah bin Khalid used to tell us: O young people! Do not think that al-Hasan denied predestination, for his opinion (i. e., belief) was sunnah and sight.
narrator: Yahya bin Kathir al-Anbari said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: If we learnt that the remark of al-Hasan would reach the extent that it has reached, we would write a book for his withdrawal and call witnesses to him; but we said: This is a remark that surprisingly came out (from him) and it will not be transmitted to others.
narrator: Ibn Awn said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan said: I will never return to it.
narrator: Ayyub said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Al-Hasan never interpreted any Quranic verse but to establish (Divine decree).
narrator: Uthman said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: We used to say in the times of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…: We do not compare anyone with Abu Bakr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ. Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ came next and then Uthman ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ. We then would leave (rest of) the companions of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… without treating any as superior to other.
narrator: Ibn Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was alive, we used to say: The most excellent member of the community of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… after himself is Abu Bakr, then Umar, then Uthman.
narrator: Ibn Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I said to my father: Which of the people after the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… is best? He replied: Abu Bakr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ. I then asked: Who comes next? He said: Umar. I was then afraid of asking him who came next, and he might mention Uthman ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, so I said: You came next, O my father? He said: I am only a man among the Muslims.
narrator: Muhammad bin al-Hanafiyyah said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard Sufyan say: If anyone thinks that вҖҳAli ( ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ) was more deserving for the Caliphate than both of them, he imputed error to Abu Bakr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, the Muhajirun (Immigrants), and the Ansar (Helpers) Allah be pleased with all of them. I think that with this (belief) none of his action will rise to the heaven.
narrator: Muhammad al-Firyabl said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Caliphs are five: Abu Bakr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, Uthman ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, вҖҳAli ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ and Umar bin Abdul-Aziz.
narrator: Sufyan al-Thawri said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: One day the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Which of you had dream? A man said: It is I. I saw as though a scale descended from the sky. You and Abu Bakr were weighed and you were heavier; Abu Bakr and Umar were weighed and Abu Bakr was heavier: Umar and Uthman were weighed and Umar was heavier; than the scale was taken up. we saw signs of dislike on the face of the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ….
narrator: Narrated Abu Bakrah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: One day the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… asked: Which of you had a dream? He then mentioned the rest of the tradition to the same effect, but he did not mention the word вҖңdislikedвҖқ. Instead, he said: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was grieved about that. He then said: There will be a caliphate on the model of prophecy, then Allah will give the kingdom to whom he wills.
narrator: Abu Bakrah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Last night a good man had a vision in which Abu Bakr seemed to be joined to the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. Umar to Abu Bakr, and Uthman to Umar. Jabir said: When we got up and left the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, we said: The good man is the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, and that their being joined together means that they are the rulers over this matter with which Allah has sent His Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. Abu Dawud said: It has been transmitted by Yunus and Shuaib, but they did not mention Amr bin Aban.
narrator: Jabir bin Abdullah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: A man said: Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…! I saw (in a dream) that a bucket was hung from the sky. Abu Bakr came, caught hold of both ends of its wooden handle, and drank a little of it. Next came Umar who caught hold of both ends of its wooden handle and drank of it to his fill. Next came Uthman who caught hold of both ends of its handle and drank of it to his fill. Next came вҖҳAll. He caught hold of both ends of its handle, but it became upset and some (water) from it was sprinkled on him.
narrator: Samurah bin Jundub ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ told:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Romans will enter Syria and stay there for forty days, and no place will be saved from them but Damascus and 'Uman.
narrator: Makhul said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: A king of the foreigners will come and prevail over all the cities except Damascus.
narrator: Abu al-Ayas Abdur-Rahman bin Salam said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: The place of the assembly of Muslims at the time of war will be in a land called al-Ghutah.
narrator: Makhul reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard al-Hajjaj addressing the people say: The similitude of Uthman with Allah is like the similitude of Jesus son of Mary. He then recited the following verse and explained it: вҖңBehold! Allah said: O Jesus! I will take thee and raise thee to Myself and clear thee (of the falsehood) of those who blaspheme. вҖқ He was making a sign with his hand to us and to the people of Syria.
narrator: Awf said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard al-Hajjaj say in his address: Is the messenger of one of you sent for some need is more respectable with him or his successor among his people? I thought in my mind: I make a vow for Allah that I shall never pray behind you. If I find people who fight against you, I shall fight against you along with them. Ishaq added in his version: He fought in the battle of al-Jamajim until he was killed.
narrator: Al-Rabi bin Khalid al-Dabbi said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: These clients (i.e. non-Arabs) are to be struck and cut off. I swear by Allah, if I strike a stick with a stick, I would annihilate them like the day that passed away. Al-hamra means clients or non-Arabs.
narrator: Al-Amash said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I prayed the Friday prayer with al-Hajjaj and he addressed. He then transmitted the tradition of Abu Bakr bin Ayyash. He said in it: Hear and obey the caliph of Allah and his select Abd al-Malik bin Marwan. He then transmitted the rest of the tradition, and said: If I seized Rabiah for Mudar. But he did not mention the story of the clients (i.e. non Arabs).
narrator: Sulaiman al-Amash said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The Caliphate of Prophecy will last thirty years; then Allah will give the Kingdom of His Kingdom to anyone He wills. Saeed told that Safinah said to him: Calculate Abu Bakr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ caliphate as two years, Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ as ten, Uthman ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ as twelve and Ali ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ so and so. Saeed said: I said to Safinah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ : They conceive that Ali ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ was not a caliph. He replied: The buttocks of Marwan told a lie.
narrator: Narrated Safinah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: The caliphate of Prophecy will last thirty years; then Allah will give the Kingdom to whom he wishes; or his kingdom to whom he wishes.
narrator: Safinah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The prophet of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… ascended Uhud, and Abu Bakr, Umar and Uthman followed him. It began to shake with them. The prophet of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… struck it with his foot and said: Be still, for only a prophet, an ever-truthful and two martyrs are on you.
narrator: Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Gabriel came and taking me by the hand showed the gate of Paradise by which my people will enter. Abu Bakr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ then said: Messenger of Allah! I wish I had been with you so that I might have looked at it. The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… then said: You, Abu Bakr, will be the first of my people to enter Paradise.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: No one of those who took the oath of allegiance under the tree will go to hell.
narrator: Jabir ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying вҖ“ will be according to the version of Musa: Perhaps Allah, and Ibn SinanвҖҷs version has: Allah looked at the participants of the battle of Badr (with mercy) and said: Do whatever you wish; I have forgiven you.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… went out during the time of (treaty of) al-Hudaibiyyah. He then mentioned the rest of the tradition. He said: Urwah bin Masud then came to him and began to speak to the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. Whenever he talk to him, he caught his beard ; and al-Mughirah bin Shubah was standing near the head of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… with a sword with him and a helmet on him. He then struck his hand with the handle of the sword, saying: Keep away your hand from his beard. Urwah then raised his head and said: Who is this ? The prophet said: Al-Mughirah bin Shubah.
narrator: Al-Miswar bin Makhramah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: the best of my people is the generation in which I have been sent, then their immediate followers, then their immediate followers. Allah knows best whether he mentioned the third or not. After them will be people who will give testimony without being asked, who will make vows which they do not fulfill, who will be treacherous and not to be trusted, among whom fatness will appear.
narrator: Imran bin Husain ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Do not revile my Companions; by him in whose hand my soul is, if one of you contributed the amount of gold equivalent to Uhud, it would not amount to as much as the mudd of one of them, or half of it.
narrator: Abu Saeed (al-Khudri) ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… heard UmarвҖҷs voice, Ibn ZamвҖҷah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… came out until he took out his head of his apartment. He then said: No, no, no; the son of Abu Quhafah should lead the people in prayer. He said it angrily.
narrator: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Abdullah bin ZamвҖҷah through a different chain. He said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said to al-Hasan bin Ali ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ . This son of mine is a Sayyid (chief), and I hope Allah may reconcile two parties of my community by means of him. Hammad's version has: And perhaps Allah may reconcile two large parties of Muslims by means of him.
narrator: Narrated Abu Bakrah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: There is no one who will be overtaken by trial regarding whom I do not fear except Muhammad bin Maslamah, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: Trial will not harm you.
narrator: Narrated Hudhayfah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: We entered upon Hudhaifah. He said: I know a man whom the trails will not harm. We came out and found that a tent was pitched. We entered and found in it Muhammad bin Maslamah. We asked him about it. He said: I do not intent that any place of your towns should occupy me until that which is prevailing is removed.
narrator: Thalabah bin Dubaiah said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Dubaiah bin Husain al-ThaвҖҷlabi through a different chain of narrators to the same effect.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I said to вҖҳAli (ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ): Tell me about this march of yours. Is this an order that the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… had given you, or is this your opinion that you have? He said: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… did not give me any order; but this is an opinion that I have.
narrator: Qais bin Abbad said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: In the event of the dissension among Muslims an emerging sect will emerge ; one of the two parties that is nearer to the truth will kill it.
narrator: Abu Saeed ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Do not distinguish between the Prophets.
narrator: Abu Saeed Al-Khudri ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: It is not fitting for a servent to say that I (The Prophet) is better than Jonah son of Matta.
narrator: Ibn Abbas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: It is not fitting for a prophet to say: I am better than Jonah son of matta.
narrator: Abdullah bin Jafar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: A man from among the Jews said: By him who chose Moses above the universe. So a Muslim raised his hand and slapped the Jew on his face. The Jew went to the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… and informed him. The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Do not make me superior to Moses, for mankind (on the Day of Resurrection) will swoon and I will be the know whether he was among those who swooned and had recovered before me, or he was among those of whom Allah had made an exception. Abu Dawud said: The tradition of Ibn yahya is more perfect.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: A man said to the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… : O best of all creatures! The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: That was Abraham Ш№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ….
narrator: Anas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: I shall be pre-eminent among the descendants of Adam, the first from whom the earth will be cleft open the first intercessor, and the first whose intercession will be accepted.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: I do not know whether Tubba was accursed or not, and вҖҳUzair (Azra was a prophet or not).
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: I am the nearest of kin among the people to (Jesus) son of Mary. The Prophet are brothers, sons of one father by co-wives. There is no Prophet between me and him.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Faith has over seventy branches, the most excellent of which is the declaration that there is no god but Allah, and the humblest of which is the removal of a bone from the road. And modesty is a branch of faith.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When the deputation of Abdul-Qais came to the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, he commanded them to believe in Allah. He asked: Do you know what faith in Allah is? They replied: Allah and his Messenger know best. He said: It includes the testimony that there is no god but Allah, and that Muhammad is AllahвҖҷs Messenger, the observance of the prayer, the payment of zakat, the fasts of Ramadan, and your giving a fifth of the booty.
narrator: Ibn Abbas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Between a servant and unbelief there is the abandonment of prayer.
narrator: Jabir ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: I did not see more defective in respect of reason and religion than the wise of you (women). A woman asked: What is the defect of reason and religion ? He replied: The defect of reason is the testimony of two women for one man, and the defect of faith is that one of you does not fast during Ramadan (when one is menstruating), and keep away from prayer for some days.
narrator: Abdullah bin Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… turned towards the Kaabah (in prayer), the people asked: Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…! what will happen with those who died while they prayed with their faces towards Jerusalem ? Allah the Exalted, then revealed: вҖңAnd never would Allah make your faith of no effect. вҖқ
narrator: Ibn Abbas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: If anyone loves for Allah's sake, hates for Allah's sake, gives for Allah's sake and withholds for Allah's sake, he will have perfect faith.
narrator: Narrated Abu Umamah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The most perfect believer in respect of faith is he who is best of them in manners.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… gave some people and did not give anything to a man of them. Saad said: Messenger of Allah! You gave so and so, so and so, but did not give anything to so and so while he is a believer. The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Or he is a Muslim. Saad repeated it thrice and the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… then said: I give some people and leave him who is dearer to me than them. I do not give him anything fearing lest he should fall into Hell on his face.
narrator: Saad bin Abi Waqqas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Explaining the verse, вҖңsay ; You have no faith, but you only say: We have submitted our wills to AllahвҖқ, We think that ISLAM is a word, and faith is an action.
narrator: It was narrated from Ibn Thawr, from Mamar who said: Al-Zuhri said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… distributed (spoils) among the people I said to him: Give so and so for he is a believer. He said: Or he is a Muslim. I give a man something while another man is dearer to me than him, fearing that he may fall into Hell on his face.
narrator: Saad ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Do not turn unbelievers after me ; one of you may strike the neck of the other.
narrator: Ibn Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: If any believing man calls another believing man an unbeliever, if he is actually an infidel, it is all right ; if not, he will become an infidel.
narrator: Ibn Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Four characteristics constitute anyone who possesses them a sheer hypocrite, and anyone who possesses one of them possesses a characteristics of hypocrisy till he abandons it: when he talks he lies, when he makes a promise he violates it, when he makes a covenant he acts treacherously, and when he quarrels, he deviates from the Truth.
narrator: Abdullah bin Amr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: When one commits fornication, one is not a believer; when one steals, one is not a believer; when one drinks, one is not a believer; and repentance is placed before him.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: When a man commits fornication, faith departs from him and there is something like a canvas roof over his head; and when he quits that action, faith returns to him.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The Qadariyyah are the Magians of this community. If they are ill, do not pay a sick visit to them, and if they die, do not attend their funerals.
narrator: Narrated Abdullah bin Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Every people have Magians, and the Magians of this community are those who declare that there is no destination by Allah. If any one of them dies, do not attend his funeral, and if any one of them is ill, do not pay a sick visit to him. They are the partisans of the Antichrist (Dajjal), and Allah will surely join with the Antichrist.
narrator: Hudhaifah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Allah created Adam from a handful which he took from the whole of the earth ; so the children of Adam are in accordance with the earth: some red, some white, some black, some a mixture, also smooth and rough, bad and good.
narrator: Abu Musa al-AshвҖҷari ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: He asked: What is Islam? He replied: It means saying prayer, payment of zakat, performing HAJJ, fasting during RAMADAN, and taking a bath on account of sexual defilement. Abu Dawud said: Alqamah was a Murji'i.
narrator: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Ibn Yamur, with additions and omissions, through a different chain of narrators. This version adds;
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Ubadah bin al Samit ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said to his son: Sonny! You will not get the taste of the reality of faith until you know that what has come to you could not miss you, and that what has missed you could not come to you. I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: The first thing Allah created was pen. He said to it: Write. It asked: What should I write, my lord? He said: Write what was decreed about everything till the Last hour comes. Sonny! I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: He who dies on something other than this does not does not belong to me.
narrator: Abu Hafsah said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Adam and Moses held a disputation. Moses said: Adam you are our father. You deprived us and caused us to come out from Paradise. Adam said: You are Moses Allah chose you for his speech and wrote the Torah for you with his hand. Do you blame me for doing a deed which Allah had decreed that I should do forty year before he created me? So Adam got the better of Moses in argument. Ahmad bin Salih said from Amr from Tawus who heard Abu Hurairah.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Nuaim bin Rablah said: I was with Umar bin al-Khattab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ when he transmitted this tradition. The tradition of Malik is more perfect.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah (п·ә) said: The boy whom al-Khidr had killed was created an infidel. Had he lived, he would have moved his parents to rebellion and unbelief.
narrator: Ubayy bin Kaab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… explaining the verse вҖңAs for the youth his parents were people of Faith, вҖқ he was created infidel the day when he was created.
narrator: Ubayy bin Kaab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Al-khidr saw a youth playing with boys. He took him by his head and uprooted it. Moses then said: Hast thou slain an innocent person who had slain none.
narrator: Ibn Abbas said: Ubayy bin Kaab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ told me
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was asked: Is it known who are those who will go to paradise and those who will go to hell? He said: Yes. He asked: Then what is the good of doing anything by those who act? He replied: Everyone is helped to do for which he has been created.
narrator: Imran bin Husain ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was asked: Do not sit which those who believe in free will and do not address them before they address you.
narrator: Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was questioned about the offspring of polytheists, he said: Allah knows best about what they were doing.
narrator: Ibn Abbas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I said: Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… what happens to the offspring of believers ? He replied: They are joined to their parents. I asked: Messenger of Allah! Although they have done nothing ? He replied: Allah knows best what they were doing. I asked: what happens to the offspring of polytheists, Messenger of Allah ? he replied! They are joined to their parents. I asked: Although they have done nothing? He replied: Allah knows best what they were doing.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was invited to the funeral of a boy who belonged to the ANSAR and I said; Messenger of Allah! This one is blessed, for he has done no evil, nor has he known it. He replied: It may be otherwise, Aishah, for Allah created Paradise and created those who will go to it, and He created it for them when they were still in their fatherвҖҷs loins; and he created hell and created those who will go to it, and created it for them when they were still in their fatherвҖҷs loins.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§, mother of the believers, said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Every child is born on Islam, but his parents make him a Jew and a Christian, just as a beast is born whole. Do you find some among them (born) maimed? The people asked: Messenger of Allah! What do you think about the one who died while he was young? He replied: Allah knows best what he was going to do.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard Malik when it was said: The heretics argue from this tradition against us. Malik said: Argue against them from its last part which goes. The people asked: What do you think about the one who died while he was young? He replied: Allah knows best what he was going to do.
narrator: Ibn Wahb said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Explaining the tradition вҖңEvery child is a born on IslamвҖқ, Hammad bin Salamah said: In our opinion it means that covenant which Allah had taken in the loins of their fathers when He said: вҖңAm I not your Lord? They said: Yes.
narrator: Al-Hajjaj bin Al-Minhal said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Amir reported the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: The woman who buries alive her new-born girl and the girl who is buried alive both will go to Hell. This tradition has also been transmitted by Ibn Masud from the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… to the same effect through a different chain of narrators.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: A man asked: where is my father, Messenger of Allah? He replied! Your father is in Hell. When he turned his back, he said: My father and your father are in Hell.
narrator: Anas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: The devil flows in a man like his blood.
narrator: Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Do not sit with those who believe in free will and do not address them before they address you.
narrator: Umar bin al-Khattab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as sayings: People will continue to ask one another (questions) till this is pronounced: Allah created all things, but who created Allah ? Whoever comes across anything of that, he should say: I believe in Allah.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: He then mentioned a tradition like it. This version adds: When they propound that, say: Say Allah is one. Allah is He to Whom men repair. He has not begotten and He has not been begotten, and no one is equal to Him. Then one should spit three times on his left side and seek refuge in Allah from Satan.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Simak through a different chain of narrators to the same effect.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The tradition mentioned above has again been transmitted by Simak through a different chain of narrators and to the same effect as this lengthy tradition.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: I have been permitted to tell about one of AllahвҖҷs angels who bears the throne that the distance between the lobe of his ear and his shoulder is a journey of seven hundred years.
narrator: Jabir bin Abdullah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ recite this verse: вҖңAllah doth command you to render back your trusts to those to whom they are dueвҖқ up to вҖңFor Allah is he who heareth and seeth all thingsвҖқ. He said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… putting his thumb on his ear and finger on his eye. Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… reciting this verse and putting his fingers. Ibn Yunus said that al-Muqri said. вҖңAllah hears and seesвҖқ means that Allah has the power of hearing and seeing. Abu Dawud said: This is a refutation of the Jahmiyyah.
narrator: Abu Yunus Sulaim bin Jubair, client of Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ, said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When we are were sitting with the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… he looked at the moon on the night when it was full, that is, fourteenth, and said: You will see your Lord as you see this (moon) and have no doubts about seeing him. If, therefore, you can keep from being prevented from prayer before the sun rises and before it sets, do so. He then recited: вҖқCelebrate the praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its settingвҖқ.
narrator: Jarir bin Abdullah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The people asked: Messenger of Allah! Shall we see our lord, the Exalted, on the Day of resurrection? He replied: Do you feel any trouble in seeing the sun at noon when it is not in the cloud? They said: No. He asked: Do you feel any trouble in seeing the moon on the night when it is full and not in the cloud? They replied: No. He said: By him in whose hand my soul is, you will not feel any trouble in seeing him except as much as you feel in seeing any of them.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I asked: Messenger of Allah! will each one of us see his Lord? Ibn Muadh's version has: being alone with Him, on the Day of Resurrection? And what sign is there is His creation? He replied: Abu Razin! does each one of you not see the moon? Ibn Muadh's version has: on the night when it is full, being alone with it? Then the agreed version goes: I said: Yes. He said: Allah is more great. Ibn Muadh's version has: It is only part of Allah's creation, but Allah is more glorious and greater.
narrator: Narrated Abu Razin al-Uqayli ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Allah will fold the heavens an the day of Resurrection, then seizing them in His right hand he will say: I am the king. Where are the mighty men? Where are the proud men? He will then fold the earths and take them in his other hand (According to the version of Ibn al-Ala), and then say; I am the King. Where are the mighty men? Where are the proud men?
narrator: Abdullah bin Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying; Our lord gets down every night to the heaven of this world when a third night remains and says: (Is there anyone) who prays to Me so that I may accept his prayer? (Is there anyone) who asks of Me so that I may give him? (Is there anyone) who asks for my forgiveness so that I may forgive him?
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… presented himself to the people at Arafat, saying: Is there any man who takes me to his people? The Quraysh have prevented me from preaching the word of my Lord.
narrator: Narrated Jabir bin Abdullah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I thought in my mind that my affair was far inferior to the speaking of Allah about me with a command that will be recited.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I was with the Negus when his son recited a verse of the Gospel. So I laughed. Thereupon he said: Do you laugh at the word of Allah, the Exalted?
narrator: Amir bin Shahr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… used to seek refuge in Allah for al-Hasan and al-husain ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ , saying; I seek refuge for both of you in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and every poisonous thing and from the evil eye which influences. He would then say; your father sought refuge in Allah by them for Ismail and Ishaq. Abu Dawud said; this is a proof of the fact that the Quran is not created.
narrator: Ibn Abbas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying ; when Allah, the exalted, speaks to send revelation the inhabitant of the heaven hear the clinging of a bell from the other heaven like pulling a chain on the mountain of al-safa, and then swoon. They continue to remain in this recover and say ; what did your lord say, Gabriel? He would say ; Truth, so they would say; Truth, truth.
narrator: Abdullah (bin Masud) ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: My intercession will be for those of my people who have committed major sins.
narrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: People will come forth from Hell by MuhammadвҖҷs intercession, will enter paradise and be named Jahannamis.
narrator: Imran bin Husain ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: Those who go to Paradise will eat in it and drink.
narrator: Jabir ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The trumpet (sur) which will be blown.
narrator: Narrated Abdullah bin Amr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Every son of Adam will be devoured by the earth with the exception of the tail-bone from which he was created and from which he will be reconstituted.
narrator: Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Before you there will be a pond the distance between whose sides is like that between Jarbah and Adhruh.
narrator: Ibn Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: We were with the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. He said when we arrived at a halting place: You are not a hundred thousandth part of those who will come down to me at the pond. I (the narrator Abu Hamzah) asked: What was your number that day? He replied: Seven or eight hundred.
narrator: Narrated Zayd bin Arqam ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When the Prophet of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was lifted to the heavens (for travelling) in Paradise, or as he said, a river whose banks were of transparent or hollowed pearls was presented to him. The angel who was with him struck it with his hand and took out musk. Muhammad ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… then asked the angel who was with him: What is this? He replied: It is al-Kawthar which Allah has given you.
narrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: When a Muslim is questioned in the grave he testifies that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is AllahвҖҷs Messenger. That is verified by AllahвҖҷs words: вҖңAllah establishes those who believe with the word that stands firm. вҖқ
narrator: Al-Bara bin Azib ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When a man is placed in his grave and his friends leaves him, he hears the beat of his sandals. Then two angles come and speak to him. He then mentioned the rest of the tradition nearly similar to the previous one. It goes: As for the infidel and hypocrite they say to them. This version adds the word вҖңhypocriteвҖқ. And he said: those who are near him will hear (his shout) with the exception of men and jinn.
narrator: The tradition mentioned above has also transmitted by Abdul-Wahhab through a different chain of narrators in a similar manner. This version has:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Al-Bara (bin Azib) from the prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… through a different chain of narrators is a similar way.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I heard the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: There has been no Prophet after Noah who has not warned his people about the antichrist (Dajjal), and I warn you of him. The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… described him to us, saying: Perhaps some who have seen me and heard my words will live till his time. The people asked: Messenger of Allah! what will be the condition of our hearts on that day? Like what we are today? He replied: Or better.
narrator: Narrated Abu Ubaydah bin al-Jarrah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Ibn Umar reported: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… stood among the people and praised Allah in a way which is worthy of him, and mentioned the Antichrist (Dajjal), saying: I warn you of him, and there has been no prophet who has not warned his people about him, and Noah also warned his people about him. But I tell you about him a word which no Prophet had told his people: you should know that he will be blind in one eye, and Allah is not blind is one eye.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: He who separates from the community within a span takes off the noose of Islam from his neck.
narrator: Narrated Abu Dharr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: How will you deal with the rulers (imams) who appropriate to themselves this booty? I said: I swear by him who sent you with the truth that at that time I shall put my sword on my shoulder and smite with it till I meet you, or I join you. He said: shall I not guide you to something better than that? You must show endurance till you meet me.
narrator: Abu Dharr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: He said: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: You will have commanders some of whom you will approve and some of whom you will disapprove. He who expresses disapproval with his tongue (Abu Dawud said: This is HishamвҖҷs version) is guiltless; and he who feels disapproval in his heart, is safe, but he who is pleased and follows them. He was asked; shall we not kill them, Messenger of Allah? Abu DawudвҖҷs version has: Shall we not fight with them? He replied: No, so long as they pray.
narrator: Umm Salamah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§, wife of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… is reported:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: He who disapproves is guiltless, and he who disapproves is safe. Qatadah said: it means one who feels its disapproval in his heart, and one who expresses disapproval in his heart.
narrator: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Umm Salamah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ through a different chain of narrators to the same effect. This version has:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: He heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: various corruptions will arise in my community, so strike with sword the one who tries to cause separation in the matter of Muslims when they are united, whoever he be.
narrator: вҖҳArfajah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ told:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Ali ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ mentioned about the people of al Nahrawan, saying: Among them there will be a man with a defective hand or with a small hand. if you were not to overjoy. I would inform you of what Allah has promised (the reward for) those who will kill them at the tongue of Muhammad ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. I asked: Have you heard this from him? He replied: Yes, by the lord of the Kaabah.
narrator: Ubaidah (al-salman) said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: He said: Their sign is shaving the head and eliminating the hair. If you see them, kill them. Abu Dawud said: Tasmid means uprooting the hair.
narrator: The tradition mentioned above has also been transmitted by Anas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ through a different chain of narrators in a similar manner. This version adds:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: When I mention a tradition to you from the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, it is dearer to me that I fall from the heaven than I lie on him. But when I talk to you about matters between me and you, then war is a deception. I heard the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… say: Towards the end of the time there will be people who are young in age and from Islam as an arrow goes through the animal aimed at, and their faith will not pass their throats. Wherever you meet them kill them, for their killing will bring a reward for him who kills them on the day of Resurrection.
narrator: Ali ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: Ali said: search for the man with crippled hand. he then mentioned the rest of the tradition. This version has: They took him out from beneath the slain in the dust. Abu al-wadi said: As if I am looking at an ABYSSINIAN WITH A SHIRT ON HIM. HE HAD ONE OF HIS HANDS LIKE THE NIPPLE OF THE FEMALE BREAST, HAVING HAIR ON IT LIKE THE HAIR ON THE TAIL OF THE JERBOA.
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: This man with the crippled hand was on that day with us in the mosque. We would sit with him by day and by night, and he was a poor man. I saw him attending the meals of Ali (Allah be pleased with him) which he took with the people, and I clothed him with a cloak of mine. Abu Maryam said: The man with the crippled hand was called Nafi Dhu al-Thadyah (Nafi, man of nipple). He had in his hand something like a female breast with a nipple at it ends like the nipple of the female breast. If had some hair on it like the whiskers of cat. Abu Dawud said: Hw was known among the people by the name of Harqus.
narrator: Abu Maryam said:
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: If the property of anyone is designed to be taken away without any right and he fights and is killed, he is a martyr.
narrator: Narrated Abdullah bin Amr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: He who is killed while protecting his property is a martyr, and he who is killed while defending his family, or his blood, or his religion is a martyr.
narrator: Narrated Saeed bin Zayd ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :
chapterName: Model Behavior of the Prophet (Kitab Al-Sunnah)

text: I served the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… at Madina for ten years. I was a boy. Every work that I did was not according to the desire of my master, but he never said to me: Fie, nor did he say to me: Why did you do this? or Why did you not do this?
narrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Good way, dignified good bearing and moderation are the twenty-fifth part of Prophecy.
narrator: Narrated Abdullah bin Abbas ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ :

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: if anyone suppresses anger when he is in a position to give vent to it, Allah, the Exalted, will call him on the Day of Resurrection over the heads of all creatures, and ask him to choose any of the bright and large eyed maidens he wishes. Abu Dawud said: The name if the transmitter Abu Marhum is Abdur-Rahman bin Maimun
narrator: Narrated Muadh bin Jabal ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: He then mentioned a similar tradition described above. This version has: Allah will fill his heart with security and faith. He did not mention the words Allah will call him . This version further adds: He who gives up wearing beautiful garments when he is able to do so (out of humility, as Bishr's version has) will be clothed by Allah with the robe of honour, and he who marries for Allah's sake will be crowned by Allah with the crown of Kingdom.
narrator: Suwaid bin Wahb quoted a son of a Companion of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… who said his father reported:

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Whom do you consider a wrestler among you? The people replied: (the man) whom the men cannot defeat in wrestling. He said: No, it is he who controls himself when he is angry.
narrator: Abdullah (bin Masud) ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:

text: Two men reviled each other in the presence of the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… and one of them became excessively angry so much so that I thought that his nose will break up on account of excess of anger. The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: I know a phrase which, if he repeated, he could get rid of this angry feeling. They asked: What is it, Messenger of Allah? He replied: He should say: I seek refuge in Thee from the accursed devil. Muadh then began to ask him to do so, but he refused and persisted in quarrelling, and began to enhance his anger.
narrator: Narrated Muadh bin Jabal ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: Two men reviled each other in the presence of Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. Then the eyes of one of them became red and his jugular veins swelled. The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: I know a phrase by repeating which the man could get rid of the angry feelings: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed devil. The man said: Do you see insanity in me.
narrator: Sulaiman bin Surad said:

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said to us: When one of you becomes angry while standing, he should sit down. If the anger leaves him, well and good; otherwise he should lie down.
narrator: Narrated Abu Dharr ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… sent Muadh for some of his work. He then transmitted the rest of the tradition mentioned above. Abu Dawud said: This tradition is sounder of the two traditions.
narrator: Bakr said:

text: We entered upon Urwah ibn Muhammad ibn as-Saadi. A man spoke to him and made him angry. So he stood and performed ablution; he then returned and performed ablution, and said: My father told me on the authority of my grandfather Atiyyah who reported the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Anger comes from the devil, the devil was created of fire, and fire is extinguished only with water; so when one of you becomes angry, he should perform ablution.
narrator: Narrated Atiyyah as-Saadi: Abu Wail al-Qass said:

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was never given his choice between two things without taking the easier (or lesser) of them provided it involved no sin, for if it did, no one kept farther away from it than he. And the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… never took revenge on his own behalf for anything unless something Allah had forbidden has been transgressed, in which event he took revenge for it for AllahвҖҷs sake.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… never struck a servant or a woman.
narrator: Aishah  ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:

text: Explaining the Quranic verse вҖңhold to forgivenessвҖқ, Abdullah bin Al-Zubair said: The prophet of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was commanded to hold to forgiveness from the conduct of the people.
narrator: Abdullah bin Az-Zubair ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:

text: When the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… was informed of anything of a certain man, he would not say: What is the matter with so and so that he says? But he would say: What is the matter with the people that they say such and such?
narrator: Narrated Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§, Ummul Muminin:

text: A man who had the mark of yellowness on him came to the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…. The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… rarely mentioned anything of a man which he disliked before him. When he went out, he said: Would that you asked him to wash it from him. Abu Dawud said: Salam is not 'Alawi (from the descendants of Ali). He used to foretell events by stars. He bore witness before Abi bin Arafat to the visibility of moon, but he did not accept his witness.
narrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: The believer is simple and generous, but the profligate is deceitful and ignoble.
narrator: Narrated Abu Hurairah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: A man asked permission to see the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, and he said: He is a bad son of the tribe, or: He is a bad member of the tribe. He then said: Give him permission. Then when he entered, he spoke to him leniently. Aishah asked: Messenger of Allah! You spoke to him leniently while you said about him what you said! He replied: The one who will have the worst position in AllahвҖҷs estimation on the day of resurrection will be the one whom people left alone for fear of his ribaldry.
narrator: Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ said:

text: A man asked permission to see the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ…, and the Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: He is a bad member of the tribe. When he entered, the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… treated in a frank and friendly way and spoke to him. When he departed, I said: Messenger of Allah! When he asked permission, you said: He is a bad member of the tribe, but when he entered, you treated him in a frank and friendly way. The Messenger of Allah replied: Aishah! Allah does not like the one who is unseemly and lewd in his language.
narrator: Narrated Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ , Ummul Muminin:

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Aishah! There are some bad people who are respected for fear of their tongues.
narrator: The tradition mentioned above has been transmitted by Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ through a different chain of narrators. This version has:

text: I never said that when any man brought his mouth to the ear of the Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… and he withdrew his head until the man himself withdrew his head, and I never saw that when any man took him by his hand and he withdrew his hand, until the man himself withdrew his hand.
narrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… passed by a man of the Ansar when he was giving his brother a warning against modesty. The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: Leave him alone, for modesty is a part of faith.
narrator: Abdullah bin Umar ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒЩ…Ш§ said:

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: One of the things people have learnt from the words of the earliest prophecy is: If you have no shame, do what you like.
narrator: Abu Masud ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: By his good character a believer will attain the degree of one who prays during the night and fasts during the day.
narrator: Narrated Aishah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒШ§ , Ummul Muminin:

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: There is nothing heavier than good character put in the scale of a believer on the Day of Resurrection. Abu al-Walid said: I heard Ata al-Kaikharani say: Abu Dawud said: His name is Ata bin Ya'qub. He is the maternal uncle of Ibrahim bin Nafi. He is called Kaikharani or Kukharani.
narrator: Narrated Abud Darda ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Prophet ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… said: I guarantee a house in the surroundings of Paradise for a man who avoids quarrelling even if he were in the right, a house in the middle of Paradise for a man who avoids lying even if he were joking, and a house in the upper part of Paradise for a man who made his character good.
narrator: Narrated Abu Umamah ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ :

text: The Messenger of Allah ШөЩ„ЫҢ вҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ вҖҢШ№Щ„ЫҢЫҒ вҖҢЩҲШіЩ„Щ… as saying: Neither the Jawwaz nor the Jazari will enter paradise. He said that the Jawwaz is the one who is coarse and uncivil.
narrator: Harithah bin Wahab ШұШ¶ЫҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЫҒ Ш№ЩҶЫҒ reported:
